name: Beauty Booster Bundle
description_html: Glow from the inside out with a 3-month supply of our best-selling Colostrum & Collagen. One scoop a day nourishes hair, skin, and nails with a blend of bioactive colostrum, grass-fed collagen, and premium probiotics. This gut-balancing beauty boost tastes like nothing and mixes easily with everything — from your favorite Greens to your iced coffee — promoting youthful-looking skin and healthy hair with every sip.

name: Blender Bottle
description_html: Our 28oz Bloom Blender Bottle is essential for all of your Bloom supplements. Perfect for mixing on the go!

name: Bloom Pop - Root Beer Float Gift
Bloom Pop™ Prebiotic Soda
description_html: This isn’t regular soda… it’s Bloom Pop! Bold, bubbly flavor meets real gut health benefits for a deliciously irresistible sip. Crafted with clinically-backed prebiotics, better-for-you ingredients, and no junk — finally, a better way to satisfy your soda cravings!

name: Bloom Starter Kit
description_html: Blooming into your best self just got easier with a kit full of Bloom essentials! It has everything you need to kickstart your daily Greens routine. The box includes 30 servings of our best-selling Greens, an Electric Mixer, and a Mini Glass Bottle. Choose your favorite flavor to get started!

name: Brain & Body Duo
description_html: Fuel your brain health & body goals with 5g of the most clinically studied creatine, now available in two swappable forms that make it easier (and more delicious) than ever to stick to your routine!

name: Brains & Gains Set
description_html: Refresh your fitness routine with this sculpting & strengthening duo. Clear Protein delivers essential fuel for lean muscle growth and recovery while Creatine carves out visible definition and tone, all in one juicy sip that’ll keep you looking and feeling like that girl — in and out of the gym!

name: Clear Protein
description_html: Meet the most refreshing way to hit your nutrition goals and enhance your glow! Clear Protein combines ultra-filtered whey isolate and collagen peptides in a light and juicy sip that’s easy to digest and impossible to resist, delivering 30% of your daily protein in one fresh & fruity scoop.

name: Clear Protein (UK)
description_html: Meet the most refreshing way to hit your nutrition goals and enhance your glow! Clear Protein combines ultra-filtered whey isolate and collagen peptides in a light and juicy sip that’s easy to digest and impossible to resist, delivering 30% of your daily protein in one fresh & fruity scoop.

name: Colostrum & Collagen Peptides
description_html: Elevate your daily routine with our advanced 3-in-1 wellness formula. Sustainably sourced colostrum is carefully blended with grass-fed collagen peptides and premium probiotics to balance gut health, support immunity, and nourish hair, skin & nails.

name: Complete Balance Trio
description_html: Bring your hormone health back into balance with this 90-day routine. Our expert-developed formula features science-backed botanicals to help relieve common PMS symptoms and support healthy hormone levels for a smoother, more manageable cycle.

name: Complete Detox Trio
description_html: Cleanse and reset with this full 90-day detox protocol. Our botanical-based capsules are scientifically formulated to support liver function and promote gentle detoxification, clearing the pathways for hormone harmony.

name: Creatine Gummies
description_html:
An essential in every woman’s wellness routine, these creatine monohydrate gummies make getting your daily dose of brain and body fuel fun, easy, and delicious!

 

  • 5g clinically studied creatine per serving
  • Promotes lean muscle without bulk or bloat
  • Increases strength
  • Supports cognitive health
  • Tastes amazing

name: Creatine Monohydrate
description_html: Empower your brain & body with Creatine Monohydrate. Scientifically formulated to build lean muscle, improve strength, and support cognitive function, our micronized creatine is a daily essential for every woman’s wellness routine. Use it any time of day to elevate your workouts, fight fatigue, fuel recovery, and more!

name: Creatine Monohydrate
description_html: Empower your brain & body with Creatine Monohydrate. Use it any time of day to elevate your workouts, fight fatigue, fuel recovery, and more!

name: Daily Gummies Duo
description_html: Snackify your supplement stack with an on-the-go duo that covers nutrient gaps and helps crush your fitness goals in the most delicious way!

name: Double the Flavor Bundle
description_html: Switch up your Greens routine based on your flavor craving! This bundle includes two 30-serving bottles in mouthwatering flavor combinations so you can enjoy all the benefits without ever getting bored. Each scoop contains 38 good-for-you ingredients that relieve bloat, aid digestion, support gut health, and promote energy in the most delicious way every day.

name: E-Gift Card
description_html: Give the gift of choice with a Bloom e-gift card! Delivered in minutes, they’re the perfect gift for last-minute shoppers — no wrapping required.

name: Electric Mixer
description_html: Our High Powered Mixer instantly blends your favorite Bloom supplements to perfection (no clumps here!). With an extra boost of power, this mixer can blend through many different liquids ensuring the best consistency, every time.

name: Energy Sticks
description_html: Your favorite energy drink now comes in a convenient stick to take on the go! Made with natural caffeine, B vitamins, and l-theanine, this zero-sugar drink mix delivers a deliciously fruity energy boost without the crash. Just mix your desired amount into water for the perfect pick-me-up!

name: Energy Sticks Duo
description_html: Your favorite energy drink now comes in a convenient stick to take on the go! Made with natural caffeine, B vitamins, and l-theanine, this zero-sugar drink mix delivers a deliciously fruity energy boost without the crash. Just mix your desired amount into water for the perfect pick-me-up!

name: Festival Trucker Hat
description_html: Bloom Festival Merch has landed! Meet our limited-edition Festival Trucker Hat so you can have fun under the sun wherever you are. This green & white hat features breathable mesh and an adjustable snap closure for the comfiest fit.

name: Fitness Faves Bundle
description_html: Crush your goals in and out of the gym with this duo of performance essentials. High Energy Pre-Workout boosts endurance and focus so you can get in more reps with less fatigue. Creatine supports brain and muscle health for improved strength and recovery. Together, they’re an unbeatable pair!

name: Fitness Star Trio
description_html: Ignite your fitness journey with a trio that fuels every move, from pre-gym motivation to post-sweat recovery and everything in between!

name: Gut Health & Beauty Duo
description_html: Double the gut health goodness! Meet the two-step routine bundle made to optimize gut health, boost immunity, and nourish hair, skin & nails so you can bloom into your best self. Featuring our best-selling Greens and new Colostrum & Collagen, this duo is all you need to glow from the inside out.

name: High Energy Pre Workout (UK)
description_html: Our iconic High Energy Pre-Workout gives you the sustained energy you need in fun flavors you'll love! Made with 220mg of natural caffeine from green tea extract, it’s specially formulated with functional ingredients and no added sugar to minimize jitters and prevent caffeine crashes — so you can crush your workouts and feel your best!

name: High Energy Pre-Workout
description_html: Our iconic High Energy Pre-Workout gives you the sustained energy you need in fun flavors you'll love! Made with 220mg of natural caffeine from green tea extract, it’s specially formulated with functional ingredients and no added sugar to minimize jitters and prevent caffeine crashes — so you can crush your workouts and feel your best!

name: Hormone Health Intro Bundle
description_html: Start your hormone health journey with a 30-day supply of Detox and Balance capsules. This innovative duo is expert-formulated with science-backed botanicals that work synergistically to deliver maximum hormone support.

name: Hormone Health: Balance
description_html: Feeling out of sync? Bring back the balance and feel your best with these advanced hormone health capsules. Our expert-developed formula features science-backed botanicals to help relieve common PMS symptoms and support healthy hormone levels for a smoother, more manageable cycle.

name: Hormone Health: Detox
description_html: Cleanse and reset without the harsh side effects. Designed to be taken as a 90-day detox protocol, these botanical-based capsules are scientifically formulated to support liver function and promote gentle detoxification, clearing the pathways for hormone harmony.

description_html: Finally, Greens your little ones will love! Scientifically formulated with 20+ fruits & veggies, vitamins & minerals, and pre & probiotics, these delicious Greens support healthy digestion and boost immunity while making it easy to increase your child’s daily fruit & veggie intake.*
